title: rubus × ablutus
intro: Rubus × ablutus, also known as the hybrid raspberry, is a cross between the Rubus idaeus and Rubus fruticosus species, resulting in a unique and versatile plant. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its high content of anthocyanins, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rubus × ablutus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. The herbal preparations of Rubus × ablutus can be consumed as jams, jellies, and teas, or used topically in creams and salves, making it a valuable addition to various traditional medicine practices.
